title: symplocos cochinchinensis var. thwaitesii
intro: Symplocos cochinchinensis var. thwaitesii, also known as the Symplocos of Sri Lanka, is a variety of the Symplocos cochinchinensis plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Symplocaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Symplocos cochinchinensis var. thwaitesii include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
